description: The end-card call-to-action: a doodle like / subscribe / play button cluster on a flat field, elements popping with radiating ticks. The ONLY place saturated brand colours (YouTube red, like blue, star yellow) are allowed.
whenToUse: The closing CTA beat ('keep on swimming', 'subscribe', outro).
generalize: The CTA elements and the field are SLOTS; the brand colours are the one sanctioned exception to the palette.
produces: gpt-image-2 doodle CTA (like/subscribe/play, brand colours) as bgUrl or overlays; optional closing word (title-bold) overlay.

elements.note: which CTA doodles: like, subscribe, play, bell, stars

styleLock: CTA doodles are gpt-image-2 art; the closing word is gpt-image-2 lettering. Brand colours (YouTube red/like blue/star yellow) allowed ONLY here.
rules: Only place saturated brand colours are allowed.
Reserve for the outro/CTA beat only.
Elements can pop with radiating ticks (channel style).
